fragments.fragment: The Sovereign Brain uses a multi-layer architecture (Soter, Mnemosyne, Janus, Guardrail) to eliminate hallucinations.
Sovereign Precision Standard: 0% hallucinations achieved by defaulting to [UNKNOWN] when consensus is not met.
The Attention Sink formula: T = 1 if 1/|H| * sum(sum(Ah(t, s))) > tau.
Sovereign Gap: Architectural Uncertainty (|r| = -0.490) is a superior predictor of correctness than softmax probabilities.
fragments.provenance: Nature MI Manuscript - Empirical Evidence Section

fragments.fragment: The 100% precision claim is based on the Soter-Caldar N=99 validation sprint.
Sovereign Lenses include The Skeptic, The Expert, The Adversary, The Archivist, and The Generalist.
The Guardrail Monitor uses a three-fold standard: Pathos, Pheme, and Kratos.
